{{Quote|I'm told that this citizen has imported a container of Neonian Red Cheese. Have you had it? Oooh, so delicately delicious. I love that stuff|Brantlee Spondoon, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Brantlee Spondoon|Corellia}}</ref>}}
'''Neonan Red Cheese'''<ref name="LE" /> was a [[Color/Legends|crimson]]<ref name="SWG:NRC" /> [[Cheese/Legends|cheese]]<ref name="LE" /> originating on the planet [[Neona]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> It was exported from the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] to the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="SWG:NRC" /> Neonan red cheese was often served alongside [[Soup/Legends|soup]] and [[Bread/Legends|bread]].<ref name="LE" /> The cheese was served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held aboard the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the businessman [[Zoda Burb]] offered a container of Neonan red cheese to [[Brantlee Spondoon]], the assistant to the [[Diktat]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] [[Daclif Gallamby]], in order to win favors from the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] government.<ref name="SWG:BS" />
